type.description: The type of network connectivity used by the AppGateway. Default value is `TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`. Possible values are: `TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`, `TCP_PROXY`.

host_type.description: The type of hosting used by the AppGateway. Default value is `HOST_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`. Possible values are: `HOST_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`, `GCP_REGIONAL_MIG`.

display_name.description: An arbitrary user-provided name for the AppGateway.

labels.description: Resource labels to represent user provided metadata. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
